prestazioni: 3E-E (1.5L SOHC 12V) engine swap to a 5E-FHE (1.5L DOHC 16V) with a custom forged crankshaft (JUN Auto forged 5E crank, 85mm stroke) and forged pistons (CP-Carrillo 8.5:1 compression ratio) for high-RPM reliability, paired with a TODA Racing Stage 2 camshaft (272° duration, 11.0mm lift) and titanium retainers (Toda Racing) to handle 9,000 RPM safely. Port-and-polish the cylinder head with a 3-angle valve job (Supertech 1mm oversized valves) and dual valve springs (Toda Racing) for aggressive cam profiles.

Custom turbocharged setup using a Garrett GT2554R (54mm compressor, .63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom manifold (JUN Auto 3E/5E tubular manifold, equal-length runners) and a front-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-S, 22x6x3.5 core). Fuel system upgrades include a Walbro 255 LPH in-tank pump, 650cc/min injectors (ID1000), and a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom 3E/5E base maps for boost control (18psi peak, 14psi daily). Exhaust system features a custom 2.5" stainless steel downpipe (JUN Auto) and a HKS Hi-Power Spec-L (50mm diameter) cat-back with a 200-cell catalytic converter (MagnaFlow) for emissions compliance.

Chassis reinforcement with a Cusco Type-RS 4-point strut tower bar (front) and a Cusco 22mm rear sway bar (adjustable, 3-position) to reduce body roll. Suspension upgrades include Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs, 16-way damping adjustability) with custom camber plates (SPL Parts, -3.5° front camber) and poly bushings (Energy Suspension, full set). Braking system features DBA 4000 Series rotors (vented, slotted) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge). Limited-slip differential (Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD) for improved 4WD traction.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V1 kit (fiberglass fenders, 50mm wider front, 70mm wider rear) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon, 2x2 twill) for weight reduction. Front bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed splitter (ABS plastic, 3" overhang) and a carbon fiber lip (VIS Racing) with integrated tow hooks. Rear diffuser fabricated from aluminum (custom design, 3-fin setup) with a carbon fiber rear wing (APR Performance GTC-200, 60" width, 3-position adjustability).

OEM+ interior with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with Bride Zeta III seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) and Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses. Custom gauge cluster with Defi Advance BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a carbon fiber pod (JDM Garage). Shift knob replaced with a custom titanium knob (TWM, 5-speed pattern) and a short-throw shifter (Cusco Type-RS, 30% reduction). Sound deadening removed and replaced with a full Dynamat Xtreme kit for weight savings.

Custom livery featuring a matte white base (3M 1080 vinyl wrap) with gloss black accents (3M 2080, two-tone) and a hand-painted "Tercel 4WD" script (calligraphy style, red/black gradient) on the hood. Side skirts and rocker panels wrapped in carbon fiber vinyl (Vvivid, dry carbon texture) with a custom pinstripe (1/8" gold, hand-painted). Wheels are Work Meister S1 3P (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear) and custom center caps (laser-engraved Toyota emblem).
